content:
# Numerical Dispersion

**Summary**: The artificial spreading of a concentration or saturation front due to the discretization of the governing equations.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2022]] evaluated how EDMM reduces numerical_dispersion compared to DMM.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2022]] critical in determining the accuracy of water breakthrough predictions.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2022]] compared results against a fine-scale reference model.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- EDMM reduced both homogenization and numerical dispersion errors, even when paired with less accurate upscaling methods like GA. ([[2022-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2022, p. 54]])
